profiles.appliesWhen: The field carries an amount, balance, fee, or other monetary value.

dimensions.currency: Accepted currency codes and cross-field currency consistency.
dimensions.unit: Major versus minor units and any scaling rule.
dimensions.aggregateLimits: Per-request, daily, or other aggregate limits.

profiles.appliesWhen: The field carries a phone, mobile, MSISDN, or telephone number.

dimensions.format: Accepted local, national, or E.164 representation.
dimensions.length: Minimum, maximum, and exact length rules.
dimensions.charset: Accepted digits, prefixes, separators, and symbols.
dimensions.normalization: Provider normalization and returned canonical form.

profiles.appliesWhen: The field identifies a bank, wallet, or payment account.

dimensions.leadingZero: Preservation and handling of leading zeroes.
dimensions.separators: Acceptance of spaces, dashes, or other separators.
dimensions.maskingEncryption: Masking, encryption, transport, and logging requirements.

profiles.appliesWhen: The field carries an account, wallet, payee, or beneficiary name.

dimensions.whitespace: Leading, trailing, repeated, and internal whitespace handling.
dimensions.matching: Exact, normalized, fuzzy, or provider-specific matching behavior.

profiles.appliesWhen: The field carries card data, expiry data, a security code, or a card token.

dimensions.validation: Luhn, expiry, BIN, token, or related validation.
dimensions.storageLogging: Storage, masking, encryption, and logging restrictions.

profiles.appliesWhen: The field carries an identity number, identity type, or identity-related date.

dimensions.typeDependency: Rules that depend on identity type, country, or issuer.
dimensions.dateSemantics: Date format, timezone, age, and boundary semantics.
dimensions.maskingEncryption: Masking, encryption, transport, and logging requirements.

profiles.appliesWhen: The field selects or identifies a bank, merchant, or other institution.

dimensions.length: Minimum, maximum, or exact identifier length.
dimensions.providerMapping: Mapping between internal and provider institution identifiers.
dimensions.sourceBinding: Authoritative catalog, source, and binding rule.
dimensions.supportScope: Supported institutions and relevant catalog scope.

profiles.appliesWhen: The field identifies, correlates, reconciles, or deduplicates a request or resource.

dimensions.duplicateBehavior: Behavior for repeated or reused values.
dimensions.reconciliation: Mapping between caller and provider identifiers.

profiles.appliesWhen: The field controls routing, capability, status, country, currency, party, or action selection.

dimensions.values: Official enum values and exact protocol literals.
dimensions.routingParty: Party responsible for selecting the value.
dimensions.mapping: Mapping between internal and provider values.
dimensions.unknownFallback: Behavior for unknown, omitted, or unsupported values.

profiles.appliesWhen: The field carries a date, time, timestamp, expiry, or timeout value.

dimensions.timestampUnit: Seconds versus milliseconds or another epoch unit.

profiles.appliesWhen: The field carries free text such as narration, remarks, descriptions, or message content.
The field carries a callback URL, return URL, webhook URL, or signature input.

dimensions.domainPolicy: Allowed domains, hosts, ports, and IP policies.
dimensions.canonicalization: Exact bytes, serialization, and canonicalization rules.
dimensions.failureHandling: Behavior when validation or verification fails.
